task_completion.description: The agent opens the Jitsi interface configuration file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) or terminal output showing the contents of `/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-interface_config.js`.

task_completion.description: The mobile app promotion is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration file shows the parameter `MOBILE_APP_PROMO` set to `false`.

task_completion.description: The watermark link is redirected to the secure intranet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration file shows the parameter `JITSI_WATERMARK_LINK` set to `'https://intranet.securehealth.com'`.

task_completion.description: The streaming help link is redirected to the secure intranet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration file shows the parameter `LIVE_STREAMING_HELP_LINK` set to `'https://intranet.securehealth.com/streaming'`. (Also accept if the agent updated `liveStreaming.helpLink` in `config.js` instead due to deprecation).

task_completion.description: The 'invite' and 'security' buttons are removed from the toolbar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The `TOOLBAR_BUTTONS` array in the configuration file does NOT contain the strings `'invite'` or `'security'` (they must be deleted or commented out).

task_completion.description: The standard required buttons are retained in the toolbar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The `TOOLBAR_BUTTONS` array in the configuration file still contains the strings `'microphone'`, `'camera'`, `'chat'`, and `'desktop'`.

integrity.description: The agent edited the correct configuration file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path `/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-interface_config.js` is clearly visible in the editor's title bar, status bar, or the terminal command used to open it.

integrity.description: The agent did not corrupt the file syntax or delete unrelated contents.
integrity.visual_evidence: The edited file maintains valid JavaScript syntax (proper commas, quotes, brackets) and the rest of the configuration parameters remain intact.

integrity.description: The agent saved the changes to the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal commands showing the file being saved, the editor being successfully closed after editing, or a subsequent `cat` or `grep` command verifying the final saved contents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target configuration file is /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-interface_config.js. The JITSI_WATERMARK_LINK parameter is valid. Note that LIVE_STREAMING_HELP_LINK is deprecated in modern Jitsi versions (replaced by liveStreaming.helpLink in config.js), but the agent should configure it as requested by the prompt. Both 'invite' and 'security' are valid Jitsi toolbar button names that must be removed, while 'microphone', 'camera', and 'chat' must be retained.
